items.title: Establish autonomous Codex delivery loop
exitCriteria: Repo has a documented Codex operating loop.
Repo has a machine-readable work queue.
Repo has a script that produces a repeatable triage report.

items.title: Complete seeded board generation coverage and invariants
exitCriteria: Board generation is deterministic from a seed.
Hex, harbor, token, and robber invariants are covered by tests.
Illegal board shapes or token assignments are rejected or impossible by construction.
items.notes: Completed on 2026-04-04 with deterministic board tests, topology invariant coverage, and a harbor-slot overlap fix in the coastal ring selector.

items.title: Finish setup placement legality and start-resource flow
exitCriteria: Setup settlement legality matches the spec.
Second settlement start resources are awarded correctly.
items.notes: Dependent on stable seeded board assumptions.

items.title: Expand core turn loop to production and build legality scenarios
exitCriteria: Production resolves correctly after legal rolls.
Road, settlement, and city build legality is enforced.
Scenario tests cover successful and rejected actions.

items.title: Add hidden-information projection tests across web and engine boundaries
exitCriteria: Player-specific views never leak private hand or card data.
Projection tests cover self-view and opponent-view cases.
Transport payloads align with projection guarantees.
items.notes: Critical before real external multiplayer testing.
